title: iris stenophylla subsp. tauri
intro: Iris stenophylla subsp. tauri, also known as the 'Taurus iris' or 'Taurus crested iris', is a plant species belonging to the iris family (Iridaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Iris stenophylla subsp. tauri include its ability to treat skin conditions, wounds, and infections, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and promote tissue repair. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures to utilize its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to fully confirm its efficacy.
